# Comprehensive Edge Case Report (625 Papers)

Using a custom heuristic scanner, I analyzed the raw text of all 625 PDFs in the `01_Academic_Papers` directory to flag specific edge cases defined in the rulebook.

## 1. Dyadic and Multi-Source Edge Cases
These papers mention dyads, triads, or supervisor-subordinate relationships.
**Total flagged: 118 papers**
Article IDs: 3, 5, 10, 11, 33, 34, 51, 70, 71, 79, 85, 87, 92, 95, 99, 100, 104, 106, 117, 125, 128, 129, 131, 137, 143, 144, 153, 158, 161, 171, 172, 173, 175, 176, 212, 230, 232, 234, 240, 241, 242, 245, 247, 251, 256, 267, 276, 277, 280, 287, 308, 309, 320, 321, 322, 327, 331, 333, 365, 369, 373, 380, 384, 398, 399, 401, 406, 408, 413, 417, 438, 441, 443, 448, 454, 460, 465, 474, 483, 493, 505, 512, 514, 525, 526, 532, 537, 543, 547, 567, 578, 590, 608, 622, 623, 627, 630, 636, 639, 640, 641, 642, 643, 645, 662, 666, 672, 692, 696, 699, 701, 702, 704, 708, 711, 714, 716, 720

## 2. Non-Individual Anchors (Firm/Team/CEO)
These papers measure boundary spanning at the team, firm, or CEO level.
**Total flagged: 209 papers**
Article IDs: 14, 15, 17, 18, 19, 26, 28, 34, 37, 38, 40, 41, 42, 51, 54, 56, 57, 60, 66, 71, 76, 79, 83, 89, 92, 97, 99, 100, 103, 104, 108, 114, 115, 120, 121, 125, 128, 130, 134, 140, 142, 146, 147, 154, 164, 171, 172, 173, 175, 181, 186, 191, 205, 206, 207, 212, 216, 217, 219, 223, 224, 226, 233, 241, 242, 248, 249, 251, 255, 263, 266, 267, 268, 269, 272, 273, 280, 281, 284, 286, 287, 288, 289, 292, 294, 295, 302, 304, 306, 307, 310, 311, 313, 317, 322, 323, 325, 326, 327, 329, 333, 335, 338, 346, 358, 360, 371, 374, 378, 380, 383, 384, 385, 391, 396, 401, 407, 408, 416, 417, 419, 427, 428, 430, 431, 435, 442, 443, 448, 452, 454, 455, 456, 458, 460, 464, 467, 477, 482, 483, 490, 491, 500, 506, 516, 517, 520, 522, 526, 529, 530, 531, 532, 533, 534, 536, 543, 547, 549, 560, 564, 567, 568, 569, 570, 572, 573, 576, 580, 591, 592, 595, 598, 600, 601, 604, 621, 622, 624, 627, 639, 640, 646, 647, 651, 653, 655, 659, 661, 662, 666, 669, 674, 677, 680, 685, 690, 691, 692, 697, 699, 710, 711, 716, 720, 722, 723, 724, 726

## 3. Misleading SEM / Latent Correlations
These papers use Structural Equation Modeling (AVE, Discriminant Validity, Latent variables) and are likely missing raw Pearson r correlations.
**Total flagged: 205 papers**
Article IDs: 12, 27, 31, 37, 38, 41, 47, 48, 51, 53, 55, 56, 60, 61, 65, 68, 76, 77, 79, 80, 81, 85, 86, 89, 90, 100, 111, 115, 119, 120, 121, 136, 137, 138, 139, 140, 142, 143, 144, 158, 167, 172, 191, 214, 219, 222, 223, 224, 229, 232, 236, 238, 240, 245, 249, 250, 251, 253, 260, 261, 266, 269, 273, 275, 276, 280, 281, 284, 285, 290, 292, 293, 294, 295, 298, 300, 302, 303, 304, 308, 309, 311, 312, 313, 316, 319, 322, 326, 331, 332, 334, 338, 352, 359, 360, 373, 376, 379, 383, 384, 385, 395, 396, 399, 406, 407, 408, 412, 413, 417, 425, 430, 435, 436, 446, 449, 451, 454, 455, 456, 470, 481, 490, 493, 494, 498, 504, 508, 510, 512, 514, 515, 516, 518, 522, 523, 526, 528, 529, 530, 532, 534, 544, 545, 547, 548, 556, 558, 559, 560, 561, 569, 572, 580, 585, 595, 598, 599, 601, 604, 605, 606, 608, 609, 610, 617, 618, 625, 627, 629, 630, 631, 633, 636, 640, 641, 642, 644, 647, 663, 665, 672, 674, 677, 686, 690, 691, 692, 696, 697, 699, 700, 702, 703, 704, 705, 708, 710, 711, 712, 716, 721, 725, 726, 732

## 4. Scale Oddities (Binary/Dichotomous variables)
These papers use binary indices rather than multi-item Likert scales.
**Total flagged: 78 papers**
Article IDs: 15, 42, 71, 73, 92, 95, 99, 103, 106, 111, 114, 125, 128, 154, 165, 166, 171, 181, 186, 206, 213, 241, 251, 266, 288, 292, 295, 316, 318, 333, 334, 335, 347, 356, 358, 368, 371, 379, 380, 381, 391, 401, 417, 424, 442, 443, 455, 458, 460, 465, 467, 514, 518, 523, 524, 544, 545, 548, 564, 575, 578, 598, 599, 601, 610, 622, 623, 641, 650, 651, 659, 684, 696, 700, 720, 722, 725, 732
